title: Unlocking Space
body: " Credit: ESA/NASA  Find out more about the Unlocking Space programme by following the link above.   Unlocking Space for Business  Drive private sector adoption of satellite data and services.    Unlocking Space for Government (Civil and Defence)  Civil: Aggregate demand across government to increase public sector adoption of satellite solutions. Defence: Create an integrated civilian and defence approach to space for national security, unlocking new revenue and growth opportunities for SMEs in the UK space sector.      Unlocking Space for Investment  Tackle access to finance barriers for the UK space sector.  "
